news.t: Vident Announces Final Capital Gains Distributions
Vident Funds Announce Final Capital Gains Distributions

holdings.infoBox: VIDI is an equity ETF with a total of 240 individual holdings. The top holdings are LG Innotek stock at 2.11%, Zhen Ding Technology Holding at 1.90%, Kingboard Holdings at 1.45%, LG Electronics at 1.03%, and Innolux at 1.00%.

overview.description: The Vident International Equity Strategy ETF (VIDI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Vident Core International Equity index. The fund tracks an index of companies from both developed and emerging markets, ex-US. The fund selects and weights its constituents in a tiered structure based on various risk and fundamental measures. VIDI was launched on Oct 29, 2013 and is issued by Vident.

data.title: Vident Announces Final Capital Gains Distributions
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vident Asset Management today announced that there are no expected capital gains distributions for the funds in its fund family.

data.title: Vident Funds Announce Final Capital Gains Distributions
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vident Funds announced that there will be no expected capital gains distributions for the funds in its fund family.
